Starting in the living room entrance, fly forward toward the doorway by the curtain and bench
turn left to face the lamp-lit table
fly through the cabinet-flanked door with a dog door
turn right into the kitchen beside the sink and stove
fly across the kitchen toward the dining table
enter the dining area beneath the vase-adorned table
turn right back into the living room by the sofa and coffee table
fly to the room  s center near the clock and window
turn right into the entrance hall past the umbrella stand and staircase
fly to the living room threshold under the curtains
turn right along the wall to a door
fly up to the bedroom doorway
approach the bed past the bedside tables
and descend onto the bed beside its lamps
